n_duration":0,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":3835,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":1368},"user_action":{"author":0,"author_digg_time":1773567894,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":"7617025006339015448","common":{"comment_type":31,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"我看了几章，差评，第1点一个普通人带7个老弱病残能占有一个码头你把玄幻当垃圾啊。第2点你的是氪金系统小混混上门你打赢了竟然不抢他们的钱，你拿什么氪金。第3点作者你把黑蛇帮帮主写成傻子了，手下回去报信不报复回去还给主角发育时间。第4主角去抢仇人的钱，只是把人打晕，气势恐吓，砸桌子，还在那里磨磨唧唧，不知道作者傻还是把读者当傻子耍，不够心狠手辣。我只看了4章，不过番茄免费的还是给个5星好评吧.........88了。","text_exts":[{"e":17,"s":14,"text":"普通人","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317742109454F3B25A9%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227617025006339015448%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227608818295587752985%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%99%AE%E9%80%9A%E4%BA%BA%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1773536617,"group_id":"7608818295587752985","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N7MoWlVbYVduxUy9fg9iLWNroKeIFBH0GP4gGn0+bQ7Y","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1018582902520650","user_name":"九宫道的孟津妍"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1018582902520650","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7608818295587752985","book_info":{"abstract":"系统+穿越+升级+智商在线+深蓝加点
